name: Shawujinmon

signature_move.name: Kouyoujou: Kamon no Jin
signature_move.description: Raises a waterspout by freely spinning its astonishing super-heavyweight class "Kouyoujou" staff.

description: A Demon Man Digimon banished from the Digital World 's heaven. Although it is a calm and collected Digimon, it is said that a certain Digicore was sealed among the nine beads of its necklace, and if even one bead is lost it will be transformed once again into a terrifying Digimon. Its Special Moves are raising a waterspout by freely spinning its astonishing super-heavyweight class " Kouyoujou " staff ( Kouyoujou: Kamon no Jin ), and striking the ground with its staff to shatter it and release a raging current ( Kouyoujou: Taki no Jin ). Also, for close combat it can stab with the crescent-moon shaped blade ( Getsugazan ).
